summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Aurora Therapiezentrum Expert Page. All core functionality working correctly including hero section, expert cards with expansion/collapse, contact links, and responsive design.
passed_tests: Hero section with original Aurora header image loads correctly
Text 'vielfältig. erfahren. engagiert.' displays in turquoise
All 4 expert cards show round profile images, roles and names correctly
Expert cards expand on click showing room images and descriptions
All 3 category headings visible (Psychotherapie, Coaching, Physiotherapie und Osteopathie)
Contact links (email, website, phone) work correctly in expanded state
Cards can be collapsed by clicking again (toggle functionality)
Contact section with 'Kontakt' button at bottom works
Responsive design works correctly on tablet view
Framer Motion animations work smoothly for card expansion/collapse
